name: HDFC IndianOil Credit Card

fees.waiverCondition: Spend ₹50,000 or more in the previous year

categoryRates.description: 50 FuelPoints per ₹150 at IOCL fuel stations and outlets (~5% value)
5 FuelPoints per ₹150 on all other retail purchases

additionalBenefits: 5% effective reward rate at IndianOil fuel stations
Fuel surcharge waiver of 1% up to ₹250/month
pros: Excellent 5% effective return on fuel at IndianOil outlets
1% fuel surcharge waiver stacks with FuelPoints rewards
Very low annual fee of ₹500 with easy ₹50K waiver
Best-in-class fuel rewards for IOCL customers
Low income requirement of ₹2L makes it widely accessible
cons: Rewards are only valuable if you fuel at IndianOil stations
No lounge access of any kind
Non-fuel reward rate is very low at 0.5%
3.5% forex markup and no travel benefits
idealFor: Frequent drivers who refuel at IndianOil stations
Users looking for a dedicated fuel savings card with low fees
Car or bike owners who want to maximize fuel savings

faqs.question: How much can I save on fuel with this card?
faqs.answer: You earn ~5% back in FuelPoints at IndianOil outlets plus a 1% fuel surcharge waiver. On a monthly fuel spend of ₹5,000, you can save approximately ₹300 per month.

faqs.question: Can I earn FuelPoints at other fuel stations?
faqs.answer: The accelerated 50 FuelPoints per ₹150 rate applies only at IndianOil (IOCL) outlets. At other stations, you earn the base rate of 5 FuelPoints per ₹150.

faqs.question: How do I redeem FuelPoints?
faqs.answer: FuelPoints can be redeemed for fuel purchases at IndianOil outlets or converted to XTRAREWARDS loyalty points. Statement credit redemption is also available but at a lower value.
